commits.title: PATCH 1 — Fix frozen-path contradiction in §2
commits.summary: Replaced blanket /portal /brand /admin freeze with precise rule. Only auth.tsx, useCart.ts, cart/checkout, migrations, and tailwind tokens are truly frozen. Portal/brand/admin directories allowed ONLY when a WO explicitly names the file.

commits.title: PATCH 2 — Normalize P0/P1/P2/Launch Gate with single authority
commits.summary: Added §2.1 with three-tier gate definitions. P0 = MERCH-INTEL-03-DB, NEWSAPI-INGEST-01, DB-TYPES-02. P1 = 4 parallel lanes. P2 = after P1. Launch Gate aligned to /.claude/CLAUDE.md §16 (24 items).

commits.title: PATCH 3 — Add Skills Required to every WO
commits.summary: All 21 WOs now have explicit Skills Required list. Skill Creation Queue added: 5 missing skills identified (cms-status, database-types-generator, schema-drift-detector, cross-hub-dispatcher-validator, payment-flow-tester). MERCH-INTEL-03-FINAL threshold set at 10/12 PASS (MERCH-06 WARN allowed).

commits.title: PATCH 4 — Standardize Proof Pack format for every WO
commits.summary: §6 overhauled into 6.1 (required JSON schema), 6.2 (validation rules), 6.3 (prohibited patterns). All required fields now explicit: wo_id, skills_run, results, acceptance_tests, commit_sha, tsc_exit_code, build_exit_code, banned_terms_scan, overall.

commits.title: PATCH 5 — NEWSAPI-INGEST-01 implementation contract
commits.summary: Added 13-field Implementation Contract table to NEWSAPI-INGEST-01. Defines required fields per market_signals row, dedup rule (SHA-256 fingerprint), feed_run_log requirements, DLQ write requirement. Confidence values by provenance tier (tier1=0.9, Reddit=0.45).

commits.title: PATCH 6 — Fix MERCH-INTEL-03-DB acceptance tests
commits.summary: All SQL acceptance tests scoped to WHERE status='active' AND created_at >= NOW()-90d. display_order check scoped to is_enabled=true. regulatory_alert boost returns WARN (not FAIL) if 0 rows in window. Before/after row counts added to proof pack.

commits.title: PATCH 7 — Explicitly authorize CMS schema changes
commits.summary: CMS Schema Authorization table added to §1 with 7 explicitly authorized objects (story_drafts, content_placements, sitemap_cache, cms_posts.scheduled_at, data_feeds.display_order). Schema change rule: anything not listed requires a new WO. Migration numbering rule: 000031-000039 range.

commits.title: PATCH 8 — CMS block/layout/grid editability + add CMS-WO-12
commits.summary: CMS-WO-12 added: Layout Builder + Block Placement Editing. blockRegistry.ts as single source of truth. PageRenderer uses registry lookup — extensible without PageRenderer edits. Grid/rail layouts configurable via block type. Admin UI: block palette + drag-onto-canvas + inline prop editor. Team 2 updated.

commits.title: PATCH 9 — Numeric PASS criteria for DATA-PRESS-PROOF
commits.summary: 14-metric numeric table with explicit PASS/WARN/FAIL thresholds. Total signals >= 50 PASS. Last 24h >= 5. Source layers = 5 (hard). Max topic % <= 40%. Fingerprint uniqueness >= 95%. Avg confidence >= 0.55. Paid-depth WARN only (not FAIL). 6 explicit PASS criteria for overall:PASS.

commits.title: PATCH 10 — Team 0 merge authority + End-of-WO gate command
commits.summary: §6.4 added: 8-step Team 0 merge process (non-delegable). End-of-WO Gate Command: 5-step sequence (tsc, build, banned-term grep, useEffect+supabase grep, shell-detector). All steps must pass. Gate failure = STOP CONDITION. WOs queue if Team 0 unavailable — no self-certification.

manual_review.evidence: All 10 patches applied as separate commits. Each patch targets exactly the requirement stated. No scope reduction applied. Doc reviewed against /.claude/CLAUDE.md, OPERATION_BREAKOUT.md, and AGENT_SCOPE_REGISTRY.md for consistency.

patch_1_frozen_paths.evidence: §2 rule 4 now lists exact frozen items; portal/brand/admin classified as 'allowed with explicit WO file listing'

patch_2_gate_normalization.evidence: §2.1 added with 3-tier gate table; P0 = 3 WOs; 24-item launch gate references CLAUDE.md §16

patch_3_skills_coverage.evidence: 21 WOs each have Skills Required section; 5 missing skills in Skill Creation Queue

patch_4_proof_pack_schema.evidence: §6.1 has 9 required fields; §6.2 has PASS/WARN/FAIL rules; §6.3 has prohibited patterns

patch_5_implementation_contract.evidence: 13-field table in NEWSAPI-INGEST-01 with dedup, feed_run_log, DLQ rules

patch_6_sql_scoped.evidence: All 3 SQL tests scoped to status='active' and/or 90-day window; WARN not FAIL for empty result sets

patch_7_cms_authorized.evidence: 7-object authorization table; schema change rule; migration numbering range

patch_8_cms_wo12_added.evidence: CMS-WO-12 full spec added; Team 2 WO list updated; blockRegistry.ts pattern defined

patch_9_numeric_criteria.evidence: 14-metric table with numeric thresholds; 6 explicit overall:PASS criteria; baseline query included

patch_10_team0_gate.evidence: §6.4 added; 8-step merge process; 5-step gate command; npm run gate shorthand noted
